seoTitle: Braunstone vs Bray Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Braunstone and Bray Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Braunstone vs Bray Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Braunstone and Bray Park.
heading: Braunstone vs Bray Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Braunstone, New South Wales and Bray Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Braunstone has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Bray Park (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Braunstone or Bray Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Braunstone has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Bray Park scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Braunstone scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Bray Park scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Braunstone or Bray Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Braunstone has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
